name: Auto Log Fireflies Meetings to CRM

parameters.content:
## Fireflies Meeting to CRM Logger — Webhook + Fireflies + Google Sheets

This workflow automatically saves your Fireflies meeting transcripts into your CRM spreadsheet. When a Fireflies meeting finishes, Fireflies sends a notification to this workflow's webhook. The workflow then pulls the full transcript, figures out which person on the call was the client (not someone from your own team), finds that client in your Lead Database sheet, and logs the entire conversation under their record. If the client is not found in the database, the workflow simply stops without creating anything.

This is useful for sales and agency teams who want every client call automatically attached to the right lead — no manual copy-paste after meetings.

## How it works
- **1. Webhook — Receive Fireflies Notification** receives a POST request from Fireflies containing the meeting ID when a meeting is processed
- **2. Fireflies — Get Transcript** fetches the full meeting transcript, speaker list, and date using the meeting ID
- **3. Code — Clean Transcript Data** detects the client name (the speaker who is NOT from your own team) and builds the full transcript text
- **4. Google Sheets — Find Lead** looks up that client name in your Lead Database tab and returns their row (including their Lead ID)
- **5. IF — Lead Found?** checks whether a Lead ID was returned. TRUE: the client exists, continue to log. FALSE: client not in database, stop
- **6. Google Sheets — Log to Conversation Logs** appends the transcript to the Conversation Logs tab, linked to the client's Lead ID
- **No Operation** is the dead end for clients who are not in your database

## Set up steps
1. Install the Fireflies community node: Settings → Community Nodes → Install `@firefliesai/n8n-nodes-fireflies`
2. In **2. Fireflies — Get Transcript** — connect your Fireflies API credential (get the API key from your Fireflies dashboard → Integrations → API)
3. In **4. Google Sheets — Find Lead** and **6. Google Sheets — Log to Conversation Logs** — connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential and replace `YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID` with your spreadsheet ID. Your sheet needs two tabs: Lead Database (with a Name column and a Lead ID column) and Conversation Logs (with Lead ID, Date, and Details columns)
4. In **3. Code — Clean Transcript Data** — open the code and replace the team markers (`your company name`, `your team name`) with words that appear in YOUR team's speaker names, so the workflow can tell your team apart from the client
5. In Fireflies, set up a webhook that points to this workflow's Production webhook URL so meetings are sent here automatically

nodes.name: Section — Receive Notification and Get Transcript

parameters.content:
## Receive Notification and Get Transcript
Fireflies sends a webhook with the meeting ID when a meeting is processed. The Fireflies node uses that ID to fetch the full transcript, speaker list, and date.

nodes.name: Section — Detect Client and Find Lead

parameters.content:
## Detect Client and Find Lead
Code finds the client name (the speaker who is not on your team) and builds the full transcript text. Google Sheets looks that client up in your Lead Database to get their Lead ID.

nodes.name: Section — Check Match and Log Conversation

parameters.content:
## Check Match and Log Conversation
IF checks whether a Lead ID was found. If yes, the full transcript is appended to the Conversation Logs tab under that lead. If no match is found, the workflow stops at the No Operation node.

nodes.name: 6. Google Sheets — Log to Conversation Logs
No Operation — Client Not in Database

main.node: 6. Google Sheets — Log to Conversation Logs
No Operation — Client Not in Database
